name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.PedalLegsHelper.AngularSpeed
summary: Rate of pedaling. If adaptivePedal4Dragging is true then the legsAngularSpeed calculated to match the linear speed of the character can have a maximum value of angularSpeed (this max used to be hard coded to 13.0).
remarks:
Default value = 10.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 100.0f.
